case_title: ELIDA RAMOS VS. LEONEL A BARAHONA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY RAMOS, ELIDA AS TO DEFENDANT BARAHONA, LEONEL A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMOS, ELIDA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
